app.name: Spantail
app.tagline: Understand how you and your AI agents actually work.

auth.signupSubtitle: Create your account to get started.
auth.name: Name
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Log in
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetSentNotice: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox.
auth.recoveryUnavailableDescription: Email delivery is not enabled on this instance, so passwords can't be reset by email. Contact your system administrator to reset your password.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

invite.title: Accept your invitation
invite.description: Set up your Spantail account for {{email}}.
invite.invalid: This invitation is invalid or has expired.
invite.googleHint: Use the Google account for {{email}} to accept without a password.

search.title: Search
search.prompt: Type to search reports and work entries

projects.notFound: Project not found in this workspace.

agents.notFound: No activity for this agent in this workspace.

empty.title: No workspace yet
empty.admin: Create your first workspace to start logging work.
empty.member: Ask an instance admin to add you to a workspace.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.shortcutHint: Tip: press C anywhere to log work.

entries.newDescription: Record what you worked on and for how long.
entries.editDescription: Update the details of this work entry.
entries.minutesFromRange: Calculated from start and end ({{duration}}) — edit to override.
entries.author: Member
entries.noProjects: No active projects. Create one in workspace settings first.

reports.title: Reports
reports.composeDescription: Set the filters and template — the preview updates live, then save.
reports.name: Report name
reports.allProjects: Leave all unchecked to include every project.
reports.notePlaceholder: Free-form Markdown appended to the report output.
reports.noTemplates: No report templates are enabled. Ask a workspace admin to enable one.
reports.spanTooLong: Date range must be 366 days or fewer.

filter.empty: No reports match the current filters.

delete.title: Delete this report?
delete.description: This permanently deletes the report, its share links, and the copies already sent to recipients. This cannot be undone.
delete.descriptionNamed: “{{name}}” will be permanently deleted, along with its share links and the copies already sent to recipients. This cannot be undone.

preview.invalid: Set the filters above to see a preview.

detail.notFound: This report is no longer available.

shares.title: Share: {{name}}
shares.description: Create a read-only link to this report.
shares.empty: No share links yet. Create one above to share this report.

send.title: Send “{{name}}”
send.description: Deliver this report to a teammate's Spantail inbox — for review or sign-off.
send.noRecipients: No one else is a member of this report's workspaces.
send.messageHint: Optional — add context for the recipient.
send.messagePlaceholder: e.g. Weekly report for your review — let me know if anything looks off.
send.sendToSelfHint: Drop a copy into your own inbox — handy for reviewing everyone's reports together.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.unreadSummary_one: You have {{count}} unread report to review.
notifications.unreadSummary_other: You have {{count}} unread reports to review.

detail.notFound: This message is no longer available.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete comment?
deleteConfirm.description: This comment will be permanently removed.

templates.name: Template name
templates.bodyHint: Markdown with Liquid tags. Available data: report, period, entries, groups, totals; filters: format_date, format_duration, sum, group_by.
templates.managerOnlyHint: Only instance admins and template authors can manage templates.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your workspace, team and personal access.
settings.adminOnlyHint: Only workspace admins can change these settings.
settings.systemAdminOnly: Only instance admins can access this section.

createWorkspace.title: Create workspace
createWorkspace.description: Workspaces group projects and members, e.g. a department or client.

projects.title: Projects
projects.name: Project name
projects.description: Create projects, edit their details, and archive ones you no longer track. Archived projects can be deleted.
projects.editDescription: Update this project's name, slug, color and description.
projects.deleteDescription: This permanently removes the project from your workspace.
projects.deleteWarningBody: Deleting “{{name}}” permanently removes the project. Time entries logged against it are kept but no longer assigned to any project.

members.title: Members
members.label: Members
members.manageDescription: Only project members can see this project's time entries. Workspace admins always have access.

members.title: Members
members.description: Add registered users by their email address.

tokens.title: API tokens
tokens.description: Personal access tokens authenticate the CLI and MCP clients. The token is shown only once.
tokens.name: Token name
tokens.createdDescription: Copy this token now — it will not be shown again.

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Register the AI coding agents you use. Each agent gets one access token at creation so it can log its work to the bound workspace.
agents.name: Agent name
agents.workspaceRequired: Select a workspace for this agent.
agents.projectsEmpty: No projects in this workspace yet.
agents.secretDescription: Copy the token for "{{name}}" now — it will not be shown again.
agents.deleteConfirmDescription: This permanently removes "{{name}}" and revokes its access token. Logged work is preserved. This cannot be undone.

profile.title: Profile photo
profile.description: Upload an avatar shown next to your name across the workspace.
profile.hint: PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF. Square images look best.
profile.error: Please choose a PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF image.

password.title: Change password
password.description: Update the password you use to sign in. Changing it signs out your other sessions.
password.mismatch: The new passwords do not match.

authentication.title: Connected accounts
authentication.description: Link a Google or GitHub account to sign in with it, or disconnect one you no longer use.
authentication.lastAccount: This is your only sign-in method, so it cannot be disconnected. Set a password or link another account first.
authentication.noneAvailable: No social login providers are enabled on this instance.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Set your timezone, language, and appearance.
preferences.timezoneHint: IANA name (e.g. Asia/Tokyo). Your dates and times show in it across the app. Leave empty to use UTC.

users.title: Users
users.createDescription: Email delivery is off, so the user is created immediately with a generated password.
users.inviteDescription: Send an email invitation; the user sets their own name and password.
users.generatedDescription: Share this one-time password with the user. It will not be shown again.

delete.title: Delete this user?
delete.description: This permanently deletes the user and all of their work entries, reports, and tokens. This cannot be undone.

users.adminBanner: These accounts span every workspace on this Spantail instance and are visible only to instance admins.

agentsAdmin.title: AI agents
agentsAdmin.description: Let members log the work time and token usage of their AI coding agents. Off by default.
agentsAdmin.enableHint: Heads up: turning this on can grow data volume substantially — each agent session, and later per-turn events, is stored. Leave it off unless you want this telemetry.
agentsAdmin.adminBanner: The AI agents feature applies to the whole instance and is visible only to instance admins.

email.title: Email
email.description: Email delivery uses Cloudflare Email Service and requires a Workers Paid plan. It is off by default.
email.enableHint: When off, invitations are disabled and you hand out generated passwords directly.
email.adminBanner: Email delivery applies to the whole instance and is visible only to instance admins.

oauth.title: Social login
oauth.description: Let users sign in with Google or GitHub. Each provider is off until you enable it, and only available once its OAuth client credentials are configured on this instance.
oauth.adminBanner: Social login applies to the whole instance and is visible only to instance admins.
oauth.notConfiguredHint: OAuth credentials are not configured for this provider. Set them as environment secrets to enable it.
oauth.allowedDomainsHint: One domain per line. Google users in these domains can join without an invitation. Leave empty to require an invitation for everyone; out-of-domain users can still be invited.

general.logoDescription: Shown on the workspace switcher in the sidebar.
general.logoHint: PNG, JPEG or WebP, up to 1 MB.
general.logoErrorType: Logo must be a PNG, JPEG or WebP image.
general.logoErrorSize: Logo exceeds the maximum size of 1 MB.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose the color scheme for {{name}}. This applies to everyone in the workspace.
appearance.accentDescription: Recolors highlights, charts and surfaces across the app.

workspace.title: Create your first workspace
workspace.subtitle: You're the administrator of this instance. Start by creating a workspace to group your projects and work.

project.title: Create a project
project.subtitle: Projects group the work you log. You can add more — and pick colors — later.

instance.title: Instance settings
instance.subtitle: Optional. Turn on email and social login now, or skip and configure them later in Settings.
instance.emailHint: Production email needs Cloudflare Email Service: a Workers paid plan and a verified sending domain. Until then, leave it off and add members directly.
instance.oauthUnconfigured: Set this provider's client ID and secret in the environment to enable it.

invite.title: Invite your team
invite.subtitleEmail: Send invitation emails. Each person joins with their own password.
invite.subtitleNoEmail: Email delivery is off, so members are created directly — share each generated password securely.

done.title: You're all set
done.subtitle: Your workspace is ready to use.
